title: Add Silenos Visual Production & Illustration Studio to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Silenos Visual Production & Illustration Studio](https://www.silenos.es/ilustrador/) to image
- Centraliza literatura, contenido creativo y desarrollo técnico en la plataforma silenos.es con un enfoque minimalista y preciso, priorizando el contenido puro y arquitecturas lógicas.

Fixes #12394

gist.headline: A new studio blooms
gist.blurb: Silenos Visual Production & Illustration Studio has joined the garden. Literature, illustration, creative work, and tidy technical architecture now have a place on the Pollinations app map.
gist.summary: Added Silenos Visual Production & Illustration Studio, a minimal silenos.es platform bringing together literature, creative content, illustration, and technical development, to the image apps directory.
gist.impact: People exploring Pollinations-powered image projects can now discover Silenos and its focused visual-production and illustration work directly from the community listings.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy illustration studio as a small garden workshop: Polly is a friendly artist-bee in a painter's beret, tending an easel where a clean botanical illustration and a tiny architectural sketch grow together. Include a retro terminal, potted code-plants, sketchbooks, and soft minimal studio shelves to represent Silenos combining literature, creative production, illustration, and logical technical architecture.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm minimalist illustration studio where Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears a tiny painter's beret while painting a botanical illustration on an easel beside potted code-plants and a retro terminal; lime green (#ecf874) appears prominently in the canvas glow, plants, and studio accents. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, with subtle pixel-font text reading “SILENOS,” nostalgic but beautiful and emotionally warm.
